title: lycium patagonicum var. normale
intro: Lycium patagonicum var. normale, also known as Patagonian wolfberry, is a plant species from the nightshade family, native to the Patagonian region of Argentina and Chile. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lycium patagonicum var. normale include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and support immune function. This plant can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, or consumed as a dietary supplement.
